sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Juventus are in strong form with no losses in their last 4 matches, showing consistency with 2 wins and 2 draws. Venezia, on the other hand, have struggled, managing only 1 win in their last 5 matches and failing to keep a clean sheet during this period.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, matches between Venezia and Juventus have been competitive, with a 2-2 draw in December 2024 and a 2-1 Juventus win in 2022. Both games saw goals from both sides, indicating a trend of high-scoring affairs.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Juventus, positioned 4th with 67 points, have a superior attacking output with 55 goals scored compared to Venezia's 30. Venezia, sitting 19th with 29 points, have conceded 53 goals, highlighting defensive vulnerabilities that Juventus could exploit.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Juventus players like Dušan Vlahović (10 goals) and Randal Kolo Muani (7 goals) are in fine form, posing a significant threat. Venezia's attack, led by Gaetano Oristanio (3 goals), may struggle against Juventus' defensively solid setup.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Juventus are likely to dominate possession (averaging higher than Venezia’s 44.8%) and create more big chances, as seen in recent matches. Venezia’s tendency to concede late (28% of goals in 76-90 minutes) could be a critical factor if Juventus press late in the game.
